sys_script_include.description:
The Tasker User Info Scripts are all in this Script Include. These fuctions are called from business rules filters and client scripts through the ClientUserInfoScripts script incluide 2.8.4HF | 2024-01-18 | DFCT0012092 - "OU Member Administrator" & "OU Hierarchy Administrator" user in OU Structure when adding New OU Member the roles are READ Only and it should not be 2.8.3HF | 2023-11-02 | DFCT0012261 - "Set Member OU as the new Default Member OU?" is gray out with role of GHA and TAA 2.8.3HF | 2023-10-23 | DFCT0012237 - Template page performance is slow for users in many OUs and for large org structures 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-28 | STRY0145242 - Allow sharing to 'Ancestor' offices for "Who Can Run" in Templates 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-15 | DFCT0012146 - Non-Template and Non-OUTD users cannot access OU templates even if "Flexible Template Run Permissions" is shared with them 2.8.5 | 2.23-08-11 | raj | DFCT0012124 - Template List > ErrorServer JavaScript error Cannot find function userCanRunTemplate in object [object Object]. displayed 2.8.3 (Tempate Updates Addon) STRY0141844 - DHS S&T - Permissions for running a template from a task 2.8.3 | 2023-06-24 | raj | STRY0141431 - Assigned GHA After Creating Top OU 2.8.3 | 2023-06-19 - raj - DFCT0012024 - TAA cannot create an Organizational Hierarchy structure, on a new install. "Click here to create one" does Not work 2.8.3 | 2023-06-19 - raj - DFCT0011913- Permissive OU office selection and member selections are available to all users in a controlled tasker setting even if that OU is outside their tasking pattern. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011967 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in a Private Structure should NOT see another Open Structure's OU 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011988 - "Create Top Organizational Unit" should NOT display duplicate fields on the modal 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011990 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in a Private Structure should NOT be sent Org Request from another Open Structure's OU 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011994 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in an Open Structure should NOT see the Private Structure's OU, "Org Request". 2.8.3 | 2023-06-12 | raj | DFCT0011987 - "Template level"> Personal Template does NOT display for Personal Template,Template Designer and Task Manager. (Open and Private OU Members) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-11 | raj | DFCT0011973 - ONLY if you have URL from Open OU Templates > GTD, TPA, TE, and TA's in a Private OU can see and modify all global templates even if they are from an open OU. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-11 | raj | DFCT0011964 - Choice list for Assigned Member field is not correct (only showing self) when Task Executive is creating a new task or a personal template 2.8.3 | 2023-06-08 | raj | DFCT0011928 - GTD, TPA, TE, and TA's in a Private OU can see and modify all global templates even if they are from an open OU. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-06 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.8.1 | 2023-04-17 | raj | DFCT0011765 - null: no thrown error -As a Task User error raised when opening member screen 2.8.1 | 2023-01-30 | raj | STRY0135276 - POC - Data Table - Response Comment Update - User Profile Directive - move user profile scripts from TaskWidgetData into UerInfoScritps 2.8.1 | 2022-10-24 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office
2.8 | 2022-09-19 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office 2.8 | 2022-09-19 - raj - DFCT0011294 - Errors display when adding a user to the OU. (User should not be part of any group) 2.8 | 2022-09-08 - raj - STRY0129041 - Block Search for User if Groups are Selected but aren't Configured 2.8 | 2022-09-08 - raj - STRY0129039 - OU Hierarchy Group Not Configured for Role Warning 2.8 | 2022-06-30 | raj | STRY0124857 - Use Groups Toggle (Enable/Disable Groups) 2.8 | 2022-06-30 | raj | STRY0124860 -Edit Group Names 2.7.3 | 2022-04-22 | raj | DFCT0010835 - Creating an "OU Template" with a "Restricted Group" causes the "Assignment" field filters to be incorrect 2.7.1 | 2021-11-26 | raj | STRY0114396 - Task Forms- Primary Assignee- Add new constraint logic Changes made: new method added to get list of offices for a member 2.7.1 | 2021-12-11 | raj | DFCT0010580- Any Tasker User can create DUPLICATE and EMPTY "Organizational Members" from platform 2.7.1 | 2021-12-19 | raj | DFCT0010296 - HHS: If user is in two OU and is remove/deleted from their default/primary OU, their default OU is not updated.
v2.7 STRY0095102 - Stretch- HHS/ICE: The "Task" form and "Template" form field filters should account for users that have a "Parent" (Restricted) Group STRY0059849 - OU Roles - OU Hierarchy Administrator STRY0112587 - ICE-CMS- Task Executive- Permissions/Capabilities
v 2.5 P3 STRY0084273 - Restricted Group - Template - OU, Member and Contact Field Filters based on "Restricted Group" selected STRY0084270 - Restricted Group - Task Form - OU, Member and Contact fields should filter based on "Restricted Group" selected STRY0085438 - FIX: Javascript error on new "Modals"
v 2.5.16 P2 - STRY0078831 - Added getAllMembersSysIdsInGroup: function(groupName) to address issue with Get subtask members for Administrator users - STRY0050440 - 2.5 Roles and Permissions - OU Hierarchy Administrator and Global Hierarchy Administrator - Adding SubOUs - STRY0057846 - FIX: Roles that can set default OU - STRY0076016 - RLS/PRMS - Adding, Deleting OU Members
sys_script_include.name: UserInfoScripts
